response.justification: While Bogdan is a talented, experienced software engineer with strong fundamentals and communication skills, he falls dramatically short on the role's mandatory technical requirements: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (vs. 5-10 years required), no Windows platform background, no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and zero financial services or capital markets domain knowledge. The role explicitly requires specialized expertise; his polyglot full-stack background represents the opposite career trajectory.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with 16+ years of professional experience and multiple staff/leadership roles
Proven ability to quickly master new technologies and languages across web, mobile, embedded, and systems domains
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and open source community contributions
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (Dec 2014-June 2015 at National Instruments) versus mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No Windows platform development background; entire career focused on Linux, web, cloud, and mobile systems
Zero experience in financial services, capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (mandatory 5-10 years, actual ~6 months)
